texto: In the tide pool I was riveted by fat pink sea stars sitting like satisfied gangsters and seemingly unconcerned by their exposure
autor: gulls would peck at them but the sea stars simply grew replacement limbs.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a gulls would peck at them but the sea stars simply grew replacement limbs.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “In the tide pool I was riveted by fat pink sea stars sitting like satisfied gangsters and seeming…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mary-ellen-hannibal, riveted pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
